summary: Completed full testing of PITCH'D screenplay analysis tool. Backend API tests (6/6 passed) and frontend UI tests all successful. Core functionality working: script input, character counter, generate button, AI analysis, and results display.

issues: 404 page shows blank due to base44 SDK auth query failing - the PageNotFound component tries to use base44.auth.me() which is not configured for this app

action_items: MINOR: Fix 404 page - remove base44 auth dependency from /app/src/lib/PageNotFound.jsx or simplify to show 404 without auth check
critical_code_review_comments: The PageNotFound component has unnecessary dependency on base44 SDK auth which causes blank page on unknown routes
Console shows 404 errors for /api/apps/null/entities/User/me - these are from base44 SDK trying to authenticate but can be ignored as they don't affect core functionality
test_credentials: None required - no authentication in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: /api/health, /api/analyse endpoints, homepage with PITCH'D branding, step indicator, paste text tab, upload file tab, character counter, generate button enabling at 200+ chars, AI analysis flow returning results. Only minor issue is 404 page showing blank due to base44 SDK dependency.
